title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: A vulnerability has been found in PHPGurukul Company Visitor Management System 2.0. This impacts...
description: A vulnerability has been found in PHPGurukul Company Visitor Management System 2.0. This impacts an unknown function of the file /bwdates-reports-details.php. The manipulation of the argument fromdate leads to cross site scripting. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data theft, or manipulation of user sessions.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest patch or update provided by PHPGurukul to address CVE-2026-6162.
Implement input validation and sanitization for the 'fromdate' parameter to prevent XSS attacks.
Conduct a security audit of the application to identify and mitigate other potential vulnerabilities.

title: Incorrect privilege assignment in Bluetooth in Maintenance mode prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1...
description: Incorrect privilege assignment in Bluetooth in Maintenance mode prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to bypass Extend Unlock.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows physical attackers to exploit incorrect privilege assignment in Bluetooth Maintenance mode, potentially bypassing security mechanisms like Extend Unlock, leading to unauthorized access to devices.
recommended_actions: Apply the SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 patch immediately once available to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict physical access to devices in Maintenance mode to trusted personnel only.
Conduct a security audit of Bluetooth configurations and privilege assignments to identify potential weaknesses.

Performing a manipulation of the argument cata results in sql injection. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6164.

title: Improper access control in Samsung Camera prior to version 16.5.00.28 allows local attacker to...
description: Improper access control in Samsung Camera prior to version 16.5.00.28 allows local attacker to access location data. User interaction is required for triggering this vulnerability.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a local attacker to access sensitive location data through improper access control in the Samsung Camera app. This could lead to privacy breaches and unauthorized tracking of users.
recommended_actions: Update the Samsung Camera app to version 16.5.00.28 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Educate users on the importance of keeping their apps updated and reviewing app permissions regularly.
Conduct a security audit to ensure no other improper access control vulnerabilities exist in related applications.

title: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') vulnerability in Samsung Open...
description: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') vulnerability in Samsung Open Source Escargot allows Pointer Manipulation.This issue affects Escargot: 97e8115ab1110bc502b4b5e4a0c689a71520d335.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The type confusion vulnerability in Samsung Open Source Escargot could allow attackers to manipulate pointers, potentially leading to arbitrary code execution, data corruption, or application crashes. This poses a moderate risk to systems relying on the affected software.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest patches or updates provided by Samsung for the Escargot engine to mitigate the vulnerability.
Conduct a thorough review of systems and applications using the affected version of Escargot to identify potential exposure.
Implement runtime protections and monitoring to detect and block potential exploitation attempts.

title: A vulnerability was found in code-projects Simple ChatBox 1.0. Affected by this issue is the...
description: A vulnerability was found in code-projects Simple ChatBox 1.0. Affected by this issue is the function SimpleChatbox_PHP of the file chatbox.sql of the component Endpoint. Performing a manipulation results in file and directory information exposure. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Simple ChatBox 1.0 allows remote attackers to exploit the SimpleChatbox_PHP function, leading to file and directory information exposure. This could potentially result in unauthorized access to sensitive data or aid in further exploitation.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or patch the Simple ChatBox 1.0 software if a fix is available from the vendor or community.
Restrict access to the affected component by implementing firewall rules or access controls to limit exposure.
Monitor logs for any unusual activity or signs of exploitation and consider conducting a security audit of the system.

title: A vulnerability has been found in code-projects Simple ChatBox up to 1.0. Affected by this...
description: A vulnerability has been found in code-projects Simple ChatBox up to 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /chatbox/insert.php of the component Endpoint. Such manipulation of the argument msg leads to cross site scripting. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to exploit the 'msg' parameter in the /chatbox/insert.php file, leading to cross-site scripting (XSS). This could enable attackers to execute arbitrary scripts in the context of the user's browser, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or defacement.
affected_industries: Small Businesses using the Simple ChatBox
recommended_actions: Apply input validation and sanitization for the 'msg' parameter to prevent malicious scripts from being executed.
Update to a patched version of Simple ChatBox if available or apply a temporary fix by modifying the vulnerable code.
Monitor application logs for unusual activity and educate users about potential phishing risks associated with XSS.

title: Improper access control in Samsung DeX prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers...
description: Improper access control in Samsung DeX prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to access to hidden notification contents.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows physical attackers to access hidden notification contents on devices using Samsung DeX prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1. This could lead to unauthorized disclosure of sensitive information if the device is physically compromised.
recommended_actions: Update all Samsung devices using DeX to the latest firmware version (SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 or later) as soon as it becomes available.
Implement physical security measures to prevent unauthorized access to devices, such as secure storage and user training.
Review and minimize the sensitivity of notifications displayed on lock screens or in DeX mode to reduce potential data exposure.

title: CVE-2026-5620 - A vulnerability has been found in itsourcecode Construction Management System 1.0. Affected is an un
description: A vulnerability has been found in itsourcecode Construction Management System 1.0. Affected is an unknown function of the file /borrowed_equip_report.php of the component Parameter Handler. The manipulation of the argument Home leads to sql injection. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to perform SQL injection via the 'Home' parameter in the 'borrowed_equip_report.php' file, potentially leading to unauthorized data access, data manipulation, or database compromise. The exploit is publicly available, increasing the likelihood of attacks.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and sanitization on all user-supplied data, especially for the 'Home' parameter in the affected file.
Update or patch the software to address the vulnerability, if a fix is available from the vendor.
Monitor application logs for unusual activity, such as unexpected SQL queries, and implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block SQL injection attempts.

title: CVE-2026-5619 - A flaw has been found in Braffolk mcp-summarization-functions up to 0.1.5. This impacts an unknown f
description: A flaw has been found in Braffolk mcp-summarization-functions up to 0.1.5. This impacts an unknown function of the file src/server/mcp-server.ts of the component summarize_command. Executing a manipulation of the argument command can lead to os command injection. The attack requires local access. The exploit has been published and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for OS command injection, which could enable attackers to execute arbitrary system commands, potentially leading to data exfiltration, system compromise, or further exploitation. However, exploitation requires local access, limiting its scope.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Braffolk mcp-summarization-functions to a patched version if available or consider replacing the component with a secure alternative.
Restrict local access to systems running the vulnerable component and enforce strict access controls.
Monitor for unusual activity or exploitation attempts targeting the vulnerable function and apply intrusion detection measures.

title: CVE-2026-5618 - A vulnerability was detected in kalcaddle kodbox up to 1.64. This affects an unknown function of the
description: A vulnerability was detected in kalcaddle kodbox up to 1.64. This affects an unknown function of the component shareMake/shareCheck. Performing a manipulation of the argument siteFrom/siteTo results in server-side request forgery. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The complexity of an attack is rather high. The exploitability is reported as difficult. The exploit is now public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5618.

title: CVE-2026-5616 - A security vulnerability has been detected in JeecgBoot 3.9.0/3.9.1. The impacted element is an unkn
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in JeecgBoot 3.9.0/3.9.1. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file jeecg-boot/jeecg-module-system/jeecg-system-biz/src/main/java/org/jeecg/modules/airag/JeecgBizToolsProvider.java of the component AI Chat Module. Such manipulation leads to missing authentication. The attack can be executed remotely. The name of the patch is b7c9aeba7aefda9e008ea8fe4fc3daf08d0c5b39/2c1cc88b8d983868df8c520a343d6ff4369d9e59. It is best practice to apply a patch to resolve this issue. The project fixed the issue with a commit which shall be part of the next official release.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5616.

title: CVE-2026-5615 - A weakness has been identified in givanz Vvvebjs up to 2.0.5. The affected element is an unknown fun
description: A weakness has been identified in givanz Vvvebjs up to 2.0.5. The affected element is an unknown function of the file upload.php of the component File Upload Endpoint. This manipulation of the argument uploadAllowExtensions causes cross site scripting. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. Patch name: 8cac22cff99b8bc701c408aa8e887fa702755336. Applying a patch is the recommended action to fix this issue. The vendor was contacted early, responded in a very professional manner and quickly released a fixed version of the affected product.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5615.
